description: Phase 1 - Core Engine Hardening: YAML config, pluggable strategies, position reconciliation, OMS state machine, token refresh, anomaly protection, circuit breaker

userStories.title: YAML strategy config file structure and loader
userStories.description: Create config/strategies/intraday.yaml with the schema from PRD section 6. Create config/defaults.yaml with global defaults. Implement YamlStrategyLoader in com.rj.config that reads YAML files at startup using SnakeYAML (already a Spring Boot dependency via spring-boot-starter). Parse into typed config objects.
acceptanceCriteria: config/strategies/intraday.yaml exists with trend_following, mean_reversion, volatility_breakout strategy sections matching PRD YAML schema
config/defaults.yaml exists with global risk and indicator defaults
YamlStrategyLoader class in com.rj.config loads and parses YAML into typed StrategyYamlConfig objects
Each strategy config has: enabled, symbols, timeframe, active_hours, cooldown_minutes, indicators, entry, risk, order sections
Unit tests verify: loading valid YAML, handling missing file gracefully, rejecting malformed YAML
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: CFG-Y01, CFG-Y02, CFG-Y03, CFG-Y06. Foundation for all other YAML stories. SnakeYAML is transitive via Spring Boot.

userStories.title: Per-strategy risk and order config in YAML
userStories.description: Extend YamlStrategyLoader to fully parse the risk overrides section (sl_atr_multiplier, tp_r_multiple, trailing_activation_pct, etc.) and order config section (type, slippage_tolerance, product_type). Create a StrategyRiskConfig record that RiskManager can use for per-strategy limits.
acceptanceCriteria: YAML risk section parsed into StrategyRiskConfig record with all fields from PRD schema
YAML order section parsed into StrategyOrderConfig record
RiskManager has a method to accept per-strategy risk config overrides
Defaults from config/defaults.yaml used when strategy YAML omits a field
Unit tests verify risk override loading, order config loading, and fallback to defaults
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: CFG-Y04, CFG-Y05, RSK-15. Depends on AT-001.

userStories.title: YAML config validation with rollback
userStories.description: Create ConfigValidator in com.rj.config that checks YAML values against constraints: positive numbers, valid enums (MARKET/LIMIT, INTRADAY/CNC), required fields present, ranges (0-100 for percentages). On invalid config, reject and keep previous valid values with WARN log.
acceptanceCriteria: ConfigValidator validates all required fields are present
Validates numeric ranges (e.g., risk_per_trade_pct between 0.1 and 10.0)
Validates enum values (order type, product type, timeframe, trend strength)
Invalid config is rejected; previous config retained in YamlStrategyLoader
WARN log emitted with specific validation failure reason
Unit tests for: valid config passes, missing required field, out-of-range value, invalid enum, rollback on failure
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: CFG-Y09. Depends on AT-001, AT-002.

userStories.title: YAML hot-reload via file watcher
userStories.description: Implement ConfigFileWatcher in com.rj.config using java.nio.file.WatchService on config/strategies/ directory. On file change event, reload YAML, validate via ConfigValidator, and apply to running strategy configs without restart. Run on a virtual thread.
acceptanceCriteria: ConfigFileWatcher uses WatchService to detect MODIFY events in config/strategies/
On change: reload file, validate, apply if valid
Invalid changes rejected with rollback to previous config
Runs on a virtual thread (Thread.ofVirtual())
Reload completes in < 500ms
Unit tests verify: change detection triggers reload, invalid config rejected, valid config applied
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: CFG-Y07, CFG-06, NFR-05. Depends on AT-001, AT-003.

userStories.title: Wire YAML config into StrategyEvaluator and CandleAnalyzer
userStories.description: Replace hardcoded indicator periods and thresholds in StrategyEvaluator and CandleAnalyzer with values from loaded YAML config. Strategy enable/disable controlled by YAML enabled flag. Active hours from YAML config.
acceptanceCriteria: CandleAnalyzer reads EMA fast/slow periods, RSI period, ATR period from YAML config
StrategyEvaluator reads confidence threshold, relVol threshold from YAML config per strategy
Strategy can be enabled/disabled via YAML enabled flag at runtime
Active hours from YAML config control when each strategy evaluates
Cooldown period from YAML config
Unit tests verify: strategy uses YAML values, disabled strategy is skipped, active hours respected
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: TA-07, STR-08, STR-09. Depends on AT-001, AT-002.

userStories.title: Pluggable strategy interface
userStories.description: Extract a Strategy interface from existing strategy evaluation logic. Existing strategies (TrendFollowing, MeanReversion, VolatilityBreakout) implement this interface. StrategyEvaluator discovers strategies via registration map, not hardcoded if/else. New strategies added by implementing interface + YAML config.
acceptanceCriteria: Strategy interface defined with evaluate(CandleRecommendation, StrategyYamlConfig) method
TrendFollowingStrategy, MeanReversionStrategy, VolatilityBreakoutStrategy classes implement interface
StrategyEvaluator uses a Map<String, Strategy> registry instead of hardcoded strategy logic
Strategies register by name matching YAML config key
Adding a new strategy requires only: implement interface + add YAML config block
Unit tests verify: strategy registration, evaluation delegation, unknown strategy name handled
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: STR-10, NFR-26. Core architectural improvement for strategy extensibility.

userStories.title: Historical candle seeding on startup
userStories.description: On startup (before WebSocket connects), fetch historical M5 candles from Fyers REST API for all configured symbols. Feed into CandleService/CandleAnalyzer to seed indicator calculations so strategies have enough data (min 21 candles) immediately when live ticks arrive.
acceptanceCriteria: On startup, FyersDataApi fetches last 50 M5 candles per symbol via REST API
Fetched candles fed into CandleAnalyzer to seed EMA/RSI/ATR indicator series
After seeding, indicators have >= 21 data points (min_candles threshold satisfied)
Seeding runs before WebSocket connection is established
Graceful fallback if historical API fails (log WARN, proceed without seeding)
Unit tests with mocked FyersDataApi verify seeding populates indicators
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: MKT-06. Prevents cold-start problem where strategies can't signal for first 21 candles.

userStories.title: WebSocket reconnect with bounded exponential backoff
userStories.description: Improve FyersSocketListener to handle disconnects with bounded exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s). After max 5 attempts, mark feed as permanently stale and send CRITICAL alert. Successful reconnect resets attempt counter and re-subscribes to symbols.
acceptanceCriteria: On WS disconnect, automatic reconnect attempt with exponential backoff
Backoff intervals: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s (bounded, not infinite)
Max 5 reconnect attempts before giving up
After max attempts: feed marked stale, CRITICAL log, new signals blocked
Successful reconnect: counter reset, symbols re-subscribed, feed marked active
Unit tests verify backoff timing progression, max-attempt behavior, successful recovery
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: MKT-05 (currently Partial). Critical for live trading reliability.

userStories.title: Position reconciliation on startup
userStories.description: On startup, query Fyers positions API and compare against in-memory PositionMonitor state. In paper mode, just log any discrepancies. In live mode, adopt broker positions as source of truth. Create PositionReconciler class in com.rj.engine.
acceptanceCriteria: PositionReconciler class queries FyersPositions API for open positions
Compares broker positions vs in-memory PositionMonitor state
Logs discrepancies at WARN level with full details (symbol, side, qty mismatch)
In live mode: adopts broker state as truth, updates PositionMonitor
In paper mode: log-only, no state changes
Runs during startup sequence after auth, before WebSocket connect
Unit tests with mocked FyersPositions verify: no discrepancy, extra broker position, missing broker position
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: POS-09, NFR-11. Critical for live safety — prevents ghost positions.

userStories.title: OMS state machine with idempotent client order IDs
userStories.description: Implement order lifecycle state machine in com.rj.engine. States: PENDING, SUBMITTED, PARTIALLY_FILLED, FILLED, REJECTED, CANCELLED. Transitions validated — no invalid jumps. Client order ID generated deterministically from correlationId for idempotency.
acceptanceCriteria: OrderState enum: PENDING, SUBMITTED, PARTIALLY_FILLED, FILLED, REJECTED, CANCELLED
OrderStateMachine class enforces valid transitions (e.g., PENDING->SUBMITTED ok, FILLED->PENDING rejected)
Client order ID = deterministic hash of correlationId (stable across retries)
Duplicate order submissions detected and rejected by comparing client order IDs
State transitions logged at INFO level
Unit tests: all valid transitions succeed, all invalid transitions throw, duplicate detection works
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: ORD-09. Prevents duplicate orders and tracks full lifecycle.

userStories.title: Token auto-refresh before expiry
userStories.description: Background scheduled task that tracks Fyers access token age and refreshes before the 8-hour expiry. Store new token in memory only. WARN log on refresh failure with retry. Create TokenRefreshManager in com.rj.config.
acceptanceCriteria: TokenRefreshManager tracks token creation time
Scheduled check runs every 30 minutes (ScheduledExecutorService)
Triggers refresh when token age > 7 hours (configurable threshold)
New token stored in memory, injected into FyersOrderPlacement and FyersDataApi
Refresh failure: WARN log, retry on next scheduled check
3 consecutive failures: CRITICAL log
Unit tests with mocked auth verify: refresh timing, token injection, failure handling
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: CFG-07. Eliminates manual token refresh — critical for unattended operation.

userStories.title: Anomaly auto-protection: close all and go to cash
userStories.description: Detect three anomaly types: flash crash (price drop > 5% in 5 minutes), API outage (error rate > 5/min for 2 min), unusual volume spike (> 10x average). On any detection: close all positions, activate kill switch, send CRITICAL alert, set flag requiring manual restart.
acceptanceCriteria: AnomalyDetector class in com.rj.engine monitors for three anomaly types
Flash crash: configurable price drop % and time window
API outage: configurable error rate threshold and duration
Volume spike: configurable multiplier over N-period average
On anomaly: close all positions via PositionMonitor, activate kill switch, CRITICAL log
Anomaly flag persisted (requires manual restart or explicit reset to clear)
Unit tests for each anomaly type: trigger condition met, trigger condition not met, response actions executed
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: RSK-14. Top user concern: system reliability. Full auto-protection on anomalies.

userStories.title: Circuit breaker on Fyers API error rate
userStories.description: Track Fyers API error rate with sliding window. If > 5 errors/min for 1 min, trip circuit breaker: block non-critical API calls (orders), allow read-only (positions, quotes). After configurable cooldown, half-open: test with single read call. If ok, close circuit.
acceptanceCriteria: CircuitBreaker class in com.rj.engine with states: CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN
Error counter uses sliding window (1 minute)
CLOSED->OPEN when error count > configurable threshold (default 5/min)
OPEN state: block order placement, allow position queries
HALF_OPEN after configurable cooldown (default 60s): test with one API call
HALF_OPEN->CLOSED on success, HALF_OPEN->OPEN on failure
Unit tests: trip on threshold, block during open, half-open test, recovery to closed
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: NFR-12. Prevents cascading failures when Fyers API is degraded.

userStories.title: Max portfolio drawdown limit with auto-protection
userStories.description: Track portfolio equity curve high-water mark. If drawdown from peak exceeds configurable % of capital (default 5%), trigger full auto-protection (same as anomaly response: close all, kill switch, require manual restart).
acceptanceCriteria: DrawdownMonitor class tracks running portfolio equity and high-water mark
Drawdown calculated as (peak - current) / peak
Trigger auto-protection when drawdown > configurable % (default 5%)
Uses same close-all + kill-switch mechanism as AnomalyDetector
Drawdown check runs every position monitor cycle (every 1 second)
Unit tests: drawdown calculation, trigger at threshold, no trigger below threshold
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: RSK-16. Portfolio-level protection beyond per-trade limits.

userStories.title: Fyers API health tracking metrics
userStories.description: Track per-endpoint API error count, response latency (for p99 calculation), and 429 rate-limit hit count using a sliding window. Expose metrics via HealthMonitor. WARN log when thresholds exceeded.
acceptanceCriteria: ApiHealthTracker class records each API call: endpoint, success/failure, latency_ms
Sliding window (5 minutes) for all metrics
Computes: error rate, p99 latency, 429 count per window
HealthMonitor includes API health in periodic health check output
WARN log when error rate > 10% or p99 > 2000ms or 429 count > 3
Metrics exposed via GET /api/health endpoint
Unit tests: metric recording, threshold alerting, window sliding/expiry
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: HLT-08. Visibility into broker API reliability.

userStories.title: Suppress health check stale warnings outside market hours
userStories.description: Fix partial implementation of HLT-07. HealthMonitor should suppress tick staleness WARN logs outside the 09:15-15:30 IST market window and on weekends (Saturday/Sunday). Market hours should be configurable.
acceptanceCriteria: No tick staleness WARN logs between 15:30 IST and 09:15 IST next day
No tick staleness WARN logs on Saturday or Sunday
Market hours configurable via .env (HEALTH_MARKET_START, HEALTH_MARKET_END)
Other health checks (heap, queue depth) still run outside market hours
Unit tests verify: suppression during off-hours, active during market hours, weekend suppression
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: HLT-07 (currently Partial). Eliminates noisy false-positive alerts.

userStories.title: Fixed capital allocation per strategy in YAML
userStories.description: Allow each strategy to have a capital_allocation field in YAML config. RiskManager uses per-strategy capital for position sizing instead of global capital. If not specified, falls back to equal share of global capital divided by number of enabled strategies.
acceptanceCriteria: YAML config supports optional capital_allocation field per strategy (in INR)
RiskManager.preTradeCheck() uses per-strategy capital when computing risk_budget
If capital_allocation not set: falls back to RISK_INITIAL_CAPITAL_INR / enabled_strategy_count
Sum of all strategy allocations cannot exceed total capital (validated by ConfigValidator)
Unit tests: per-strategy sizing, fallback to equal share, over-allocation rejected
mvn compile passes
mvn test passes
userStories.notes: PRD: CAP-05. Initial phase: fixed capital per strategy before dynamic allocation in P4.
